title: Metabolomics in the Development and Progression of Dementia: A Systematic Review.
author: Jiang Y Zhu Z Shi J An Y Zhang K Wang Y Li S Jin L Ye W Cui M Chen X
content: S-EPMC6474157 PMC6474157 Metabolomics in the Development and Progression of Dementia: A Systematic Review. Dementia has become a major global public health challenge with a heavy economic burden. It is urgently necessary to understand dementia pathogenesis and to identify biomarkers predicting risk
